mapper.select: SELECT cr.record_id, cr.member_id, m.member_name, cr.class_id, ct.class_name, e.employee_name AS coach_name, ct.class_begin, cr.join_time, cr.status, cr.total_sessions, cr.completed_sessions, cr.rating FROM class_record cr JOIN member m ON cr.member_id = m.member_id JOIN class_table ct ON cr.class_id = ct.class_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ct.coach_id = e.employee_id

SELECT cr.record_id, cr.member_id, m.member_name, cr.class_id, ct.class_name, e.employee_name AS coach_name, ct.class_begin, cr.join_time, cr.status, cr.total_sessions, cr.completed_sessions, cr.rating FROM class_record cr JOIN member m ON cr.member_id = m.member_id JOIN class_table ct ON cr.class_id = ct.class_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ct.coach_id = e.employee_id WHERE cr.member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT * FROM class_record WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT count(*) FROM class_record WHERE class_id = #{classId}

SELECT cr.record_id, cr.member_id, m.member_name, cr.class_id, ct.class_name, e.employee_name AS coach_name, ct.class_begin, cr.join_time, cr.status, cr.total_sessions, cr.completed_sessions, cr.rating FROM class_record cr JOIN member m ON cr.member_id = m.member_id JOIN class_table ct ON cr.class_id = ct.class_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ct.coach_id = e.employee_id WHERE cr.class_id = #{classId}
